_comment: Qwen Code Hook Configuration — Qwen Code does not natively support hooks in settings.json.
_usage: This file documents the hooks that SHOULD be executed manually or via agent behavior.
_enforcement: Qwen Code agents must follow these hooks as behavioral rules from QWEN.md.

pre-command.description: Run BEFORE heavy commands (tests, builds, etc.)

post-command.description: Run AFTER command execution for session consolidation

on-session-start.description: Run at the start of every session to sync task state
